chunk_map.heading: The machine you just met (H1 + lede)
Agreeable answers won the preference round
Unchecked, mostly-right steps stack into wrong

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Referent resolution under a sequential deck read.

rules_evaluated.evidence: chunk 1 "Agreeable answers won the preference round": line 9: "This is the machinery under the opening lecture's infinite chameleon: the LLM that flatters you, calls unfinished work progress, mirrors your stance." — names the source by claim, unpacked in the same sentence per the compendium's own worked PASS example; not a violation.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every backward reference points at a beat that exists.
rules_evaluated.evidence: chunk 2 "Unchecked, mostly-right steps stack into wrong": line 17: "That is why the failing test came before the fix." — this lecture is placed directly after the module's exercise sequence (M1 close, after compound-and-close, per this file's own maintainer STATUS/placement note); the failing-test/fix beat is the module's TDD exercise and qualifies under the module-arc-beats-in-closers carve-out.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Live-demo beats survive a text read.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Checked sub-items: 'Not X. Not Y. Z.' construction — none found. Anaphora/epistrophe triples — none. Self-grading superlatives — none. Number + own retraction — chunk 2 line 15's 'nine times in ten' / 'seven-step chain' carries its own label in the same sentence ('The numbers are an illustration, not a measurement') — compliant form, not a violation. Abstraction-noun stacks — none matching the banned pattern. Verb triplets with an empty leg — none.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Internal dialect never lands on a slide.
